title: End Game Radical Trainers
description: Additional end game content for Radical Cobblemon Trainers
body:
Requires Cobblemon | Radical Cobblemon Trainers | & Cobblemon: Mega Showdown to function properly.

### No prerequisite series required

This datapack is intended on adding end game content. Level cap starts at 95. It is suggested to complete at least 1 series in RCT prior to attempting this datapacks contents. 

**1. World Trainer Tournament**
- Title: World Tournament
- Description: Compete in the World Trainer Tournament and fight against the 25 top ranked Pokemon trainers of the world. Battle your way to the top and prove you have what it takes to become the very best!
- Difficulty: 10/10
- All level 100 Pokemon teams
- Qualify for the tournament by besting the World Trainer Tourament enterence employee.
- Once qualified, defeat the top 25 ranked trainers to earn the title Champion of the World. 
- Trainers include fan favorities from the Pokemon Anime series with accurate lore inspired teams.
- Fan favorite trainers include Leon, Cynthia, Steven, Paul, Brandon, Tobias, Palmer, and so many more!
- Featured trainers will have unique champion defining pokemon with lore accurate abilities that will be sure to give even seasoned pokemon trainers a challenge _(levitate magneton, drought typhlosion, etc)_!

**2. Team Emerald**
- Adds 136 additional trainers in the form of grunts, admins, leaders, and boss.
- Levels range from 95-100.
- Independent of any series. Standalone trainers avaiable in FreeRoam. 
- **LORE:** _In the Minecraft world, Team Emerald is a mysterious faction obsessed with the color green and emeralds, believing these gems hold the power to control nature. They worship the legendary Pokémon Rayquaza, seeking to awaken and harness its sky-shaping power. Their leader, Verdelle, is a cunning and charismatic figure said to be blessed by Rayquaza. From their hidden fortress inside a massive emerald geode, Verdelle commands her team to collect emeralds and awaken Rayquaza, aiming to reshape Minecraft into a lush, green paradise under their control. Challenging Team Emerald means facing their emerald-powered Pokémon and Verdelle’s unwavering devotion to nature’s dominance._


This datapack was designed using the Cobbleverse Modpack on Modrinth but its not required.
Please use the included resource/texture pack to ensure all trainers have their accurate skins!
